description:
Browser where your favorite apps won't get buried in tabs.


🍪 Biscuit Release Note

⚡️New features
- Added cloud sync foundations with email sign-in, account deletion, clearer scope settings, and a smoother first-sync setup flow.
- Added a built-in ad blocker with settings to enable or disable it in Biscuit.
- Added donation support and localized static help pages to make setup and support resources easier to access.

💪🏻Improvements
- Improved Google Calendar icon display.
- Updated Electron to 41.2.1 (Chrome 146) for a more modern and stable runtime.

🐞Bug
- Fixed window placement restoration on Windows and several small toolbar and sidebar UI issues.
